_comment_purpose: JSON-LD template for one testimonial. Copy this and adapt the values when a real testimonial is collected.
_comment_how_to_use: 1. Receive testimonial from real partner/client (email or whatsapp).
2. Save the original message somewhere private as proof (in case Google asks for verification).
3. Copy this template, paste it inside the target HTML page within a new <script type='application/ld+json'>...</script> block.
4. Replace ALL placeholder values (NOME_REAL, CARGO_REAL, etc.) with the verified values.
5. Do NOT add reviewRating UNLESS the testimonial source confirms a numeric score (or you have GBP data).
6. Also add the visible HTML using the .testimonial-card pattern in style.css and remove the 'hidden' attribute from the parent <section class='testimonials'>.
7. Update LocalBusiness Plumber schema (in /index.html) to add this Review inside a 'review' array (separate from this standalone block).
_comment_legal: Article 11 of Portuguese Decreto-Lei 84/2021 prohibits false testimonials. ONLY publish reviews you can prove originated from a real, identifiable person/entity. Keep the original email/whatsapp as evidence.
reviewBody: QUOTE LITERAL COPIADA DO EMAIL OU WHATSAPP — sem alteração. Não editar para soar melhor.
datePublished: YYYY-MM-DD (data em que foi recebido o testemunho)
